name_en: 【【Top Version Original Factory Leather Top Quality Original Set with Full Counter Packaging】Full Steel Hardware Black 】Top quality Goyard shopping bag SAINT LOUIS Large size made of GOYARDINE canvas, unlined, soft and lightweight, can be used on both sides, front is GOYARDINE canvas material, the other side is cotton and linen knit material. Two leather handles go from thin to thick, support multiple carrying methods. It comes with a removable inner bag, hung on one of the bag's handles for easy access.

Two leather handles go from thin to thick, support multiple carrying methods. It comes with a removable inner bag, hung on one of the bag's handles for easy access.
Size: 40X20X34(CM)

Internal Material: Linen and cotton lining

Handle Height: 21(CM)
Style: Handheld, single shoulder, hand carry
